title: helichrysum retrorsum
intro: Helichrysum retrorsum, a lesser-known species of the Helichrysum genus, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and a pungent, slightly bitter scent. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and fighting infections. Helichrysum retrorsum is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum retrorsum can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
